languages.original_text: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."

languages.text: "Нунциус обратил внимание на то, что в Секторе Бионика этого корабля с трепетом относятся к редким аугментациям. Это похвально для места, в котором нет своего генетора экстремис".
"Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスは、この船のセクター・ビオニカが珍しい増幅器を敬うことを指摘しています。自らのジェネター・バイオロギスを持っている場所としては、称賛に値する行為ですね」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does have its own Genetor Biologis."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンシウスは、この船のセクター・ビオニカが珍しい増幅器を敬うことを指摘しています。自らのジェネター・バイオロギスを持っている場所としては、称賛に値する行為ですね。」

languages.text: « Nuncius a remarqué que le secteur Bionica de ce vaisseau faisait preuve d'un grand respect à l'égard des augmentations rares. Cette approche révérencieuse est des plus louables pour un lieu qui n'a pas son propre Genetor Extremis. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius a remarqué que le secteur Bionica de ce vaisseau faisait preuve d'un grand respect à l'égard des augmentations rares. Cette approche révérencieuse est des plus louables pour un lieu qui n'a pas son propre Genetor Extremis. »

languages.text: "Nuncius hat bemerkt, dass der Sektor Bionica dieses Schiffs Interesse an seltenen Augmentationen zeigt. Das ist bemerkenswert für einen Ort ohne eigenen Genetor Extremis."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius hat bemerkt, dass der Sektor Bionica dieses Schiffs Interesse an seltenen Augmentationen zeigt. Das ist bemerkenswert für einen Ort ohne eigenen Genetor Extremis."

languages.text: "Nuncius, bu geminin Sektör Biyonika'daki nadir ogmentasyonlara saygı gösterdiğini kaydetti. Kendi Genetör Extremis'ine sahip olmayan bir yer için takdire şayan bir durum."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, bu geminin Sektör Biyonika'daki nadir ogmentasyonlara saygı gösterdiğini kaydetti. Kendi Genetör Extremis'ine sahip olmayan bir yer için takdire şayan bir durum."

languages.text: «Nuncius ha observado que en el Sector Bionica de esta nave se exhibe cierta devoción por aumentos inusuales. Resulta encomiable para tratarse de un lugar que no cuenta con su propio genetor extremis».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius has noted that the Sector Bionica of this ship displays reverence for rare augmentations. This is commendable for a place that does not have its own Genetor Extremis."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius ha observado que en el Sector Bionica de esta nave se exhibe cierta devoción por aumentos inusuales. Resulta encomiable para tratarse de un lugar que no cuenta con su propio genetor extremis».

languages.text: “努恩修斯留意到，本舰仿生区对稀有植入物抱有崇敬之心。对于一个没有特级基因士坐镇的地方来说，这样的表现值得称赞。”
